name: Rextensions
description: Manage and sync your Chrome extensions across browsers

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://www.google.com https://accounts.google.com https://www.gstatic.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.google.com https://*.gstatic.com
